Trump Announces Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz** | YES | HIGH confidence[5]

signals.raw:
VP JD Vance Defends Trump Amid Pope Leo XIV Clash Over War Policy** | NO | MED confidence[3]

Vice President JD Vance stated the pope should "stick to matters of morality" and let Trump handle U.S. policy, amid Trump's attacks on Pope Leo XIV for opposing war and an AI-generated image of Trump as Jesus; no new resolution, but escalating White House-Vatican tensions could influence Republican unity
